allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=8 -o BatchMode=yes root@watheter.com "docker exec epondok-postgres psql -U epondok -d watether -c \\"SELECT u.email, u.name, w.id as workspace_id, w.name as workspace_name FROM \\\\\\"User\\\\\\" u JOIN \\\\\\"WorkspaceMember\\\\\\" wm ON wm.\\\\\\"userId\\\\\\" = u.id JOIN \\\\\\"Workspace\\\\\\" w ON w.id = wm.\\\\\\"workspaceId\\\\\\" WHERE u.email ILIKE '%asep%' OR u.name ILIKE '%asep%' OR u.name ILIKE '%nurhakim%';\\"")
